items.title: Kimi coding model is downloadable now
items.oneliner: Open coding model with deployment docs for Transformers, SGLang, Docker, and about 30% lower token use.

items.title: Git merges code by syntax
items.oneliner: Tree-sitter merge driver resolves same-file edits structurally instead of line-by-line, with strong published merge results.

items.title: Run a local coding agent
items.oneliner: Hands-on macOS guide for llama.cpp plus Gemma setup, tuning, and OpenAI-compatible local coding agent workflows.

items.title: Publish Python WASM wheels today
items.oneliner: Pyodide now supports PyPI WebAssembly wheels, so Python packages can ship browser-ready builds with standard packaging.

items.title: Homebrew adds stronger tap security
items.oneliner: Homebrew 6.0.0 adds tap trust checks, Linux sandboxing, and faster JSON-backed updates you can install immediately.

items.title: SQLite-backed Erlang task queue ships
items.oneliner: Lightweight persistent queue for Erlang and OTP uses SQLite and Docker, keeping tasks visible until workers confirm completion.

items.title: Pure Clojure analytics database lands
items.oneliner: In-memory columnar database for Clojure runs SQL-like analytics on primitive arrays without heavyweight embedded database setup.

items.title: CLI removes filler words locally
items.oneliner: Local command line tool uses Whisper-based passes to strip ums and uhs from recordings without manual timeline editing.

items.title: Add live presence to websites
items.oneliner: Open source widget turns any page into a lightweight shared room with real-time presence and chat.

items.title: Apple shares a Swift migration
items.oneliner: Detailed engineering writeup and source show how moving TrueType hinting from C to Swift improved speed by 13%.
